text: reminder: <https://cwiki.apache.org/confluence/display/FINERACT/FSIP-7%3A+traditional+merge+strategy|do not squash commits before merging PRs>. Local rebase by contributor is OK, rebasing on github is not. In short, if all commits are verified, we're doing this right. If not, we're missing signatures or we have invalidated them by inappropriately rewriting commits (e.g. squashing)

Hi everyone! I'm Deepak Kumar S S, a GSoC 2026 applicant for Apache Fineract.
I'm a backend Java/Spring Boot engineer with 4.9 years of experience, most recently
working on the ASX CHESS Replacement project handling millions of trade settlements daily in TCS.

I've submitted two GSoC proposals:
1. FINERACT-2439 ŌĆö Self-Service BFF API (Large, 350hrs)
2. FINERACT-2485 ŌĆö Transaction Idempotency for Savings and Loans (Medium, 175hrs)

Just raised my first contribution ŌĆö migrating integration tests from RestAssured
to fineract-client-feign as part of FINERACT-2441:
<https://github.com/apache/fineract/pull/5658>

gsoc-fineract-evidence

Happy to be here and looking forward to contributing!

Hi everyone! :wave: I've raised my second contribution PR for FINERACT-2441 (fineract-client-feign migration for integration tests):
*PR:* <https://github.com/apache/fineract/pull/5659>
*What it does:*
Migrates `ClientExternalIdTest` from RestAssured to `fineract-client-feign`
ŌĆó Adds 7 new typed feign methods to `ClientHelper` for external-id operations (`addClientAsPerson`, `getClientByExternalId`, `updateClientByExternalId`, `deleteClientByExternalId`, `getClientAccounts`, `getProposedTransferDate`, `getObligeeData`)
ŌĆó Removes manual JSON payload construction in tests
Would appreciate any feedback or review! :pray:
This looks good <@U0AMVAW0Y6Q> but please make sure you are fully finishing the migration, so once the new methods are added to use fineract-client-feign, the old ones to be deleted...

Hi everyone, does <https://mifos.slack.com/archives/C028634A61L/p1773772117111409> make sense (react :+1:/:-1: please)? When you merge something on github, *do not rebase*. Per <https://cwiki.apache.org/confluence/display/FINERACT/FSIP-7%3A+Traditional+Merge+Strategy|FSIP-7>, <https://github.com/apache/fineract/pull/5663|I'm going to modify .asf.yaml on Monday to enforce this>.
